sources.title: Kubernetes Version Skew Policy
sources.scope_notes: Supports claims about supported minor-version skew between kube-apiserver, controller-manager, scheduler, kubelet, kube-proxy, and kubectl during staged upgrades and mixed-version maintenance windows.

sources.title: Upgrading kubeadm Clusters
sources.scope_notes: Supports kubeadm upgrade workflow claims: first control plane vs additional control planes, worker upgrade sequencing, drain/uncordon expectations, certificate renewal behavior, and current package-repository guidance for post-2023 releases.

sources.title: kubectl drain Reference
sources.scope_notes: Supports maintenance and upgrade claims around cordon/drain/uncordon behavior, eviction vs delete semantics, daemonset handling, graceful termination, and the risk of bypassing disruption protections.

sources.title: Node Problem Detector
sources.scope_notes: Supports claims about detecting kernel, filesystem, runtime, and hardware-adjacent node problems and surfacing them to Kubernetes as Events and NodeConditions for higher-level remediation.

sources.title: Cluster API MachineHealthCheck
sources.scope_notes: Supports claims about MachineHealthCheck remediation triggers, unhealthy-condition timeouts, short-circuit safeguards, remediation limits, and delete-and-recreate behavior for unhealthy machines.

sources.title: Prometheus Storage
sources.scope_notes: Supports claims about Prometheus local TSDB behavior, WAL replay, retention/storage tradeoffs, disk sizing pressure, and why single-node local storage becomes an operational constraint at scale.

sources.title: Grafana Loki Get Started
sources.scope_notes: Supports claims about Loki as a horizontally scalable, highly available log aggregation system, its label-based indexing model, Kubernetes log collection patterns, and self-hosted centralized logging design.

sources.title: Prometheus IPMI Exporter
sources.scope_notes: Supports claims about exporting BMC/IPMI hardware telemetry into Prometheus, multi-target scraping patterns, required FreeIPMI tooling, and integrating physical-server health into observability.

sources.title: About cgroup v2
sources.scope_notes: Backs Kubernetes cgroup v2 requirements, systemd cgroup driver expectations, and v1.35 deprecation/default kubelet startup behavior on cgroup v1 nodes during hardware refresh and node provisioning.

sources.title: Assigning Pods to Nodes
sources.scope_notes: Backs node labels, nodeSelector, node affinity and anti-affinity, and scheduler placement controls for heterogeneous hardware pools and dedicated CI builder nodes.

sources.title: Pod Topology Spread Constraints
sources.scope_notes: Backs rack/zone spread behavior, topology keys, default spread behavior, and cluster scheduling policy claims when distributing workloads across mixed racks or hardware domains.

sources.title: Disruptions
sources.scope_notes: Backs PodDisruptionBudget behavior, voluntary disruption semantics, and drain/eviction behavior relevant to decommissioning old nodes during capacity expansion.

sources.title: Tekton Pipelines
sources.scope_notes: Backs Kubernetes-native CI/CD architecture claims about Tekton CRDs, Task/TaskRun/Pipeline/PipelineRun objects, and per-task pod execution on cluster.

sources.title: The OpenContainers Distribution Spec
sources.scope_notes: Backs OCI registry protocol and API standardization claims for self-hosted registries and image distribution workflows.

sources.title: Deploy the Collector
sources.scope_notes: Backs OpenTelemetry Collector deployment patterns, especially agent and gateway topologies for splitting collection and aggregation responsibilities.

sources.title: What is Grafana Mimir?
sources.scope_notes: Backs Mimir positioning as a horizontally scalable, highly available, multi-tenant Prometheus-compatible long-term metrics backend with remote write and large active-series scale.

sources.title: Loki Cardinality
sources.scope_notes: Backs claims about Loki label cardinality, stream explosion, and why unbounded or short-lived labels degrade performance at scale.
